name: cloudasset
ruby-cloud-description: # Cloud Asset API The Cloud Asset API keeps a history of Google Cloud asset metadata, and allows Google Cloud users to download a dump of all asset metadata for the resource types listed below within an organization or a project at a given timestamp. Read more documents here: https://cloud.google.com/asset-inventory/docs. Note that google-cloud-asset-v1 is a version-specific client library. For most uses, we recommend installing the main client library google-cloud-asset instead. See the readme for more details.
